infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Wingman uses your camera to scan payment card details for subscriptions.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Wingman does not use the microphone.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Wingman does not access your photo library.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Wingman reads your calendar to detect travel events and pre-fill trip dates.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Wingman uses your location to give you hyper-local restaurant, hotel, and experience recommendations, and to estimate drive time to the airport.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Wingman uses Face ID to unlock your account securely.

widgets.name: FlightActivity
widgets.description: Your gate, your status, and the time you have left.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Wingman uses your location to give you local recommendations and estimate drive time to the airport.
